MOTION Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
